<!--
Thanks for contributing to Lighthouse! Keep PRs scoped to one logical change.
For trivial merchant-rule additions, the only thing we need is the entry in
`packages/core/src/domain/merchant_rules.ts` — no need to fill out everything
below.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves, the email it fixes, the user it helps. -->

## How to verify

<!--
- For merchant rules: paste the raw string and from-domain you tested against.
- For prompt changes: include before/after extraction output for at least one
  representative email.
- For UI changes: a screenshot or short loom helps a lot.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] Updated docs / README if user-facing behavior changed
